title: Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning for Ultrasound Speckle Reduction
abstract: arXiv:2606.25009v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Ultrasound is a non-invasive, real-time, and cost-effective imaging technique widely used in clinical diagnosis. However, its diagnostic efficacy is often compromised by inherent speckle noise that degrades image quality and obscures underlying anatomical structures. Existing speckle reduction methods tend to over-smooth tissue boundaries and generalize poorly to heterogeneous noise levels. To address these limitations, we propose a Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning (NBGL) framework for ultrasound speckle reduction, which simultaneously preserves annotated anatomical boundaries and adapts to varying noise levels. The NBGL framework consists of a speckle reduction branch and a boundary enhancement branch. The former leverages generative learning to suppress speckle noise, while the latter learns boundary-sensitive representations to preserve target anatomical structures. translated_title: 噪声感知边界增强的超声散斑抑制生成学习框架
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.25009v2 公告类型: 交叉替换 摘要: 超声是一种非侵入性、实时且成本低廉的成像技术，广泛应用于临床诊断。然而，其诊断效能常因固有的散斑噪声而受损，这种噪声会降低图像质量并模糊潜在的解剖结构。现有的散斑抑制方法往往过度平滑组织边界，且对异质噪声水平的泛化能力较差。为解决这些限制，我们提出了一种噪声感知边界增强生成学习（NBGL）框架用于超声散斑抑制，该框架能同时保留标注的解剖边界并适应变化的噪声水平。NBGL框架包含一个散斑抑制分支和一个边界增强分支。前者利用生成学习抑制散斑噪声，后者学习边界敏感表示以保留目标解剖结构。此外，一种噪声感知交互权重机制被引入，以根据局部噪声强度动态调整两个分支的贡献，从而在去噪与边界保持之间实现自适应平衡。在公共和临床超声数据集上的实验表明，NBGL在定量指标（如PSNR和SSIM）及定性视觉评估上均优于现有方法，尤其在低信噪比场景下表现突出。
tldr: 提出了一种噪声感知边界增强生成学习框架，通过生成学习抑制散斑噪声并结合边界增强分支保留解剖结构，同时利用噪声感知权重动态平衡去噪与边界保持，从而在超声图像中实现更优的散斑抑制效果。
en_tdlr: A Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning framework is proposed, which suppresses speckle noise via generative learning while preserving anatomical structures through a boundary enhancement branch, and dynamically balances denoising and boundary preservation using noise-aware weights for superior ultrasound speckle reduction.
